name: Payload
description: TypeScript-first headless CMS and application framework built on Next.js

description.value: TypeScript-first headless CMS and application framework built on Next.js

cms-type.comment: API-first headless CMS, though it integrates natively with Next.js for full-stack development

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted (free, MIT license) or Payload Cloud (managed). Cloud sign-ups paused as of late 2025 during Figma transition.

database-support.comment: PostgreSQL (via Neon on Vercel), MongoDB, and SQLite (via D1 on Cloudflare)

api-type.comment: REST API at /api, GraphQL at /api/graphql, plus Local API for direct database access

static-site-generation.comment: Native Next.js integration supports SSG; works with JAMstack workflows

edge-deployment.comment: Supports Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge deployment

content-types.comment: Collections define custom content types via code-first configuration

custom-fields.comment: Extensive field type system with full customization

field-types.comment: Text, Rich Text (Slate/Lexical), Upload (media), Relationship, JSON, Blocks (components), Array (repeater), plus many more

content-relationships.comment: Relationship fields support one-to-one, one-to-many, and polymorphic relationships

nested-components.comment: Blocks field allows mixing different component types; can be nested

localization.comment: Field-level localization with fallback support; Admin UI in 30+ languages

embedded-interactives.comment: Rich text blocks and custom components can embed interactive content

content-versioning.comment: Full version history stored in separate _versions collection

draft-publish.comment: Draft/published workflow with _status field; autosave support

scheduled-publishing.comment: Built-in scheduled publish/unpublish via job queue system

approval-workflows.comment: Multi-step approval workflows available in Enterprise tier

content-locking.comment: Not explicitly documented as a core feature

audit-logging.comment: Enterprise feature; community plugin also available (payload-audit-log)

media-library.comment: Upload-enabled collections function as media libraries with DAM features

image-transformations.comment: Sharp-based image processing with imageSizes, format conversion, focal points

external-media-storage.comment: Storage adapters for S3, Vercel Blob, Google Cloud Storage, and more

video-support.comment: Any file type can be uploaded including video

svg-support.comment: SVG upload supported via mimeTypes configuration

folder-organization.comment: Folder-based organization is a core DAM feature

role-based-access.comment: Flexible RBAC via access control functions

granular-permissions.comment: Field-level access control; UI automatically adapts to permissions

sso-saml.comment: Enterprise feature: SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0 (Azure AD, Okta, Google, etc.)

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration features in managed offering

audience-restrictions.comment: Access control functions can implement any restriction logic

typescript-sdk.comment: 100% TypeScript; auto-generated types for content schemas

content-type-sdk.comment: Code-first configuration; content types defined in TypeScript

local-development.comment: Runs locally as a Next.js app

webhooks.comment: Hooks system for integrating with third-party services

plugin-system.comment: Rich plugin ecosystem with official and community plugins

admin-ui-customization.comment: Admin panel built in React; fully customizable components

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with guides, API reference, examples, and video tutorials

frontend-frameworks.comment: Native Next.js integration; Local API works with Astro, Remix, Nuxt, SvelteKit

search-integration.comment: Plugins available for Algolia, Elasticsearch integration

preview-mode.comment: Live Preview renders frontend in admin panel with real-time updates

ecommerce-integration.comment: Headless e-commerce use case; Stripe and other payment integrations

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; can be added via custom integration

ai-features.comment: Enterprise: AI Auto-Embedding, AI content features

cdn-included.comment: Payload Cloud includes CDN; self-hosted via Vercel/Cloudflare edge

rate-limits.comment: Self-hosted has no limits; Cloud plans have usage-based limits

global-regions.comment: Cloudflare deployment offers global edge; Vercel offers multi-region

free-tier.comment: Fully open source (MIT); self-host for free

pricing-model.comment: Self-hosted is free; Cloud: Standard $35/mo, Pro $199/mo, Enterprise $10k+/yr

enterprise-features.comment: SSO, Visual Editor, Publishing Workflows, Audit Logs, AI features
